use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF GEOGRAPHIC ATROPHY SECONDARY TO AGE-RELATED MACULAR DEGENERATION BY ADMINISTERTING AVACINCAPTAD PEGOL TO THE EYE

indications.text:
IZERVAY™ is indicated for the treatment of geographic atrophy (GA) secondary to age-related macular
degeneration (AMD).

IZERVAY® is indicated for the treatment of geographic atrophy (GA) secondary to age-related macular
degeneration (AMD).

IZERVAY™ is indicated for the treatment of geographic atrophy (GA) secondary to age-related
macular degeneration (AMD).
